languages.text: "Но сервочереп не способен на комплексное мышление. Как он может быть твоим коллегой?"
"But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"
languages.original_text: "Но сервочереп не способен на комплексное мышление. Как он может быть твоим коллегой?"

traits.locale_text: "But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"
"But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"
"But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"

languages.text: «Pero los servocráneos no pueden tener pensamientos complejos. ¿Cómo puede ser su colega?».
languages.original_text: "But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"

traits.locale_text: «Pero los servocráneos no pueden tener pensamientos complejos. ¿Cómo puede ser su colega?».

languages.text: “可伺服头骨不是无法进行复杂思考吗？他怎么就成了你的同僚？”
languages.original_text: "But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"

traits.locale_text: “可伺服头骨不是无法进行复杂思考吗？他怎么就成了你的同僚？”

languages.text: « Un servocrâne n'est pas capable de pensées complexes. Comment peut-il être votre collègue ? »
languages.original_text: "But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"

traits.locale_text: « Un servocrâne n'est pas capable de pensées complexes. Comment peut-il être votre collègue ? »

languages.text: "Aber ein Servoschädel ist nicht zu komplexen Gedanken fähig. Wie kann er Euer Kollege sein?"
languages.original_text: "But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"

traits.locale_text: "Aber ein Servoschädel ist nicht zu komplexen Gedanken fähig. Wie kann er Euer Kollege sein?"

languages.text: "しかし、サーボスカルは複雑な思考ができない。どうして彼があなたの同僚になれるのですか？
languages.original_text: "But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"

languages.text: "Fakat bir hizmelet, karmaşık düşünme yeteneğine sahip değildir. Nasıl meslektaşın olabilir?"
languages.original_text: "But a servo-skull is incapable of complex thought. How can he be your colleague?"

traits.locale_text: "Fakat bir hizmelet, karmaşık düşünme yeteneğine sahip değildir. Nasıl meslektaşın olabilir?"
